case_title: DIPAK PATEL VS. CLARENCE PERKINS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, CLARENCE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CLARENCE PERKINS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF DIPAK PATEL IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

NOTICE OF DEMURRER OF DEFT CLARENCE PERKINS TO COMPLAINT OF PLTF DIPAK PATEL; DEMURRER; MEMORANDUM OF P/A, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT PERKINS, CLARENCE HEARING SET FOR FEB-25-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
